list.heading: No projects yet
list.description: Projects organise your work, documents, and time tracking. Create your first project to get started.

list.heading: No customers yet
list.description: Customers represent the organisations you work with. Add your first customer to start managing relationships.

list.heading: Just you for now
list.description: Invite team members to collaborate on projects, track time, and share documents.

list.heading: No tasks assigned to you
list.description: Tasks assigned to you across all projects will appear here. Head to a project to create or pick up tasks.

list.heading: No documents yet
list.description: Documents live inside projects. Create proposals, contracts, reports, or any other document your team needs.

list.heading: No time entries yet
list.description: Track time against tasks to monitor effort, calculate costs, and generate accurate invoices.

list.heading: No invoices yet
list.description: Generate invoices from tracked time or create them manually. You'll need at least one project with logged time.

list.heading: No templates yet
list.description: Document templates let you generate professional proposals, contracts, and reports with your branding and data pre-filled.

page.heading: No profitability data yet
page.description: Set up rate cards in Settings to start tracking project profitability. You'll need billing rates and logged time to see margins.

tab.heading: No budget configured
tab.description: Set a budget to track spending against your project plan. Choose between fixed-price or time-and-materials.

feed.heading: No activity yet
feed.description: Actions on this project — task updates, document changes, time entries, and comments — will appear here as they happen.

page.heading: You're all caught up
page.description: When there are new comments, task assignments, or status changes, they'll appear here.

section.heading: No comments yet
section.description: Start a conversation about this item. Comments are visible to all project members.

overview.heading: Nothing to show yet
overview.description: Your dashboard will come to life as you create projects, log time, and track budgets.

settings.heading: No rate cards yet
settings.description: Rate cards define what you charge clients and what your team costs. Set up rates to enable profitability tracking and invoicing.

settings.heading: No custom fields yet
settings.description: Custom fields let you capture data unique to your workflow — text, numbers, dates, or selection lists on projects, customers, and tasks.

list.heading: No saved views yet
list.description: Save your current filters and sort order as a named view. Quickly switch between different ways of looking at your data.

list.heading: No tags yet
list.description: Tags are colour-coded labels for organising projects, tasks, and customers. Create a tagging system that fits your workflow.
